历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 991, moving forward to about 865 in 2024, and moving back to about 1051 in 2025, with significant fluctuations over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 1051. The provincial science enrollment plan was 51 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 48 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 30, a sharp reduction of 37.5% compared to 2025, theoretically easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 20th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years, belonging to a top domestic engineering powerhouse. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents such as PPT disparaging other majors and exam cheating responses, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity is average (ranked 66th overall), with moderate short video exposure. It has 20 A- or above disciplines including Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Architecture A, Civil Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Water Resources Engineering A, etc., with strong engineering strength highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be socially popular, and Tianjin University's related engineering experimental classes are highly attractive. The number of science candidates in the province in 2026 is estimated at about 163,000 (based on historical proportions), a sharp increase of about 210% compared to 52,500 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The 2025 science first batch score was 421. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, far from Xinjiang, and cross-province enrollment willingness may be affected by regional preferences. The university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is about 1.5% (2025), belonging to a smaller source area.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the two core factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 1051, the sharp 37.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 (moving the ranking forward), and the explosive 210% increase in provincial candidates (moving the ranking backward), the candidate scale effect is significantly stronger than the enrollment reduction effect, leading to intensified competition in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 865, with a range of 766–964.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Information)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligence and Computing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Construction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering and Green Low-Carbon)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 766–964, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 766), you can focus on aiming for the flagship majors in Electrical and Information or Intelligence and Computing. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 964), it is recommended to lean towards Tier 2 Intelligent Manufacturing and Construction to ensure a stable admission.
